case_title: FENG YAN VS. JOHN MORTON ET AL

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF YAN, FENG AS TO DEFENDANT MORTON, JOHN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE: $40.00 SERVED FEB-25-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CIFUENTES, JOSE
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE FEE: $40.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF YAN, FENG AS TO DEFENDANT MORTON, JOHN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-08-2015 - JUDGMENT.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY YAN, FENG AS TO DEFENDANT MORTON, JOHN CIFUENTES, JOSE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-08-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-08-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-08-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY MANDARIN INTERPRETER--TOM LEE. DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER--JOHN MORTON. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YAN, FENG IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CIFUENTES, JOSE PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST JOHN MORTON HAS BEEN DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE ON 3/3/15. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
